sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run with Jono
- Started: 2025-02-12 06:14
- Distance: 7 km
- Moving time: 42:10
- Elapsed time: 43:11
- Elevation gain: 24.7 m
- Average heart rate: 164.4 bpm
- Max heart rate: 185 bpm
- Average watts: 193.2 W
- Average speed: 10 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `242` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `162.6 bpm`, ranging from `67.5` to `185.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `151.2 bpm` and second-half average HR was `174.1 bpm` (+22.9 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `158.2 spm`, with a working range of `130.0` to `174.0 spm` after excluding `4` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `153.5 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `161.5 spm` (+8.1 spm), which suggests turnover lifted rather than falling away.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:59 /km` across `7.049 km` in `42:10` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:06 /km` and second-half pace was `5:51 /km` (-15 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `164.4 bpm` average and `185 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `154.6 bpm` in the first half and `174.6 bpm` in the second (+19.9 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `42:10` out of `43:11` elapsed (97.6%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `1` stop segment and `0.1%` stationary samples, so the run stayed very continuous.

- Strava logged about `34.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.4 m` and `17.7 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `14.2 m` in the first half and `19.8 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
